prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势、2026年计划小幅扩招（+2.41%）、本省考生总数明显增加（+15.6%） 、软科排名回升至49名等正面因素，以及优势学科持续吸引高分考生，预计2026年理科竞争较2025年略有加剧，位次小幅后移。预测最低位次约22025名，区间21525–22525名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science students was approximately 15628 → 16003 → 19346 → 16551 → 21662, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. A significant backward shift occurred in 2023 (19346), a brief recovery in 2024 (16551), and a large backward shift to 21662 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 5111 places over the past two years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 21662. The provincial science enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 1382, 1394, 1401, 1374, and 1371 respectively, with 1371 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 1404, a slight expansion of 33 students (+2.41%) compared to 2025, which has a limited impact on competition and is neutral.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 49th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with recent rankings from 51st in 2021 to 59th in 2024 and back to 49th in 2026, showing a recovery to a recent high. The school's comprehensive strength and reputation are steadily improving. The 2023 reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 94th (average), with short video exposure at a medium-low level, showing no significant increase in application attention. Historical admission anomaly records are low, with no significant discontinuities. Transportation Engineering is A+ (top in the country) and Civil Engineering is A, two flagship disciplines highly related to the school's admission majors, strongly attracting applicants to related majors. However, only 2 disciplines are rated A- or above, indicating limited disciplinary coverage.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation were all highly recommended/recommended in 2024, with sustained high social popularity. The total number of examinees in the province for 2026 is 535,000 (an increase of 15.6% from 2025). Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, and as a local university, it has a natural regional preference advantage for local examinees. In 2025, the university's total plan for physics and history categories in Sichuan was about 1,534 students, accounting for a large proportion of the university's national enrollment, showing a clear local enrollment bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+2.41%), the notable increase in the number of local examinees (+15.6%), the recovery of Soft Science ranking to 49th, and the continuous attraction of high-scoring students by advantageous disciplines, it is expected that competition in 2026 will slightly intensify compared to 2025, with a minor backward shift in rankings. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 22025, with a range of 21525 to 22525.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 21525–22525, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Transportation, Mechanical, Vehicle Engineering, etc.) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Electronic Information, Electrical, Computer Science, etc.) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering, Surveying and Mapping, Logistics, etc.) as a safe backup. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<21525), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; for rankings near the upper limit (>22525), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a backup.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 3448 → 3540 → 3670 → 3727 → 4250, showing a gradual and slow backward trend over the years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 802 places in the past 5 years; the 2025 baseline is about 4250 places; the provincial liberal arts enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 166, 150, 155, 155, and 163 respectively, with 163 planned for 2025; the 2026 plan is 162, a slight reduction of 1 person (-0.61%) compared to 2025, which is minimal and has negligible impact on the competitive landscape. 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking in 2026, it is approximately 49th, with a recent upward trend, indicating steadily improving comprehensive strength of the university.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2023, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed; Douyin popularity ranking was 94th (average), with no obvious signs of increased application attention; historical admission anomaly records indicate low attention; this university is a science and engineering institution, with no A- or above discipline evaluation support for liberal arts majors, but relying on the 211 platform and regional advantages, liberal arts majors still have some appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law (diverging and wait-and-see), Chinese Language/Literature (recommended), Journalism and Communication (clearly discouraged) and other liberal arts majors show clear divergence in social popularity; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is 535,000 (an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025), expanding the competition base; Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, and as a provincial university, it has a regional preference advantage for local liberal arts candidates; in 2025, the university planned 163 places for history category in Sichuan, with a stable proportion of provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the gradual backward trend of liberal arts rankings over the years, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan (-0.61%), the significant increase in the total number of provincial candidates (+15.6%), and positive factors such as the rise in Soft Science ranking, it is expected that the competition for liberal arts in 2026 will be slightly eased compared to 2025, with a small forward shift in ranking. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4218, with a range of 3718–4718.
